ddls:
CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "index" INTEGER /* Index of the property */,
  "cardinal" TEXT /* Cardinal direction of the property (e.g., SW, NW) */,
  "street" TEXT /* Street name of the property */,
  "streetb" TEXT /* Street suffix of the property (e.g., Ave, St) */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the property is located */,
  "zipcode" INTEGER /* Zipcode of the property */,
  "lon" REAL /* Longitude of the property */,
  "lat" REAL /* Latitude of the property */,
  "price" INTEGER /* Listing price of the property */,
  "bedrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bedrooms in the property */,
  "bathrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bathrooms in the property */,
  "square_footage" INTEGER /* Total square footage of the property */,
  "year_built" INTEGER /* Year the property was built */,
  "last_renovated" INTEGER /* Year the property was last renovated */,
  "property_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the property */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* ID of the neighborhood the property belongs to */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES property_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "addresses" (
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each address */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property the address belongs to */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the property */,
  "unit_number" TEXT /* Unit number for properties in multi-unit buildings */,
  "county" TEXT /* County where the property is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the property is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_addresses_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "neighborhoods" (
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each neighborhood */,
  "neighborhood_name" TEXT /* Name of the neighborhood */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the neighborhood */,
  "median_income" INTEGER /* Median income of the neighborhood */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the neighborhood */,
  "crime_rate" REAL /* Crime rate of the neighborhood */,
  "school_quality" INTEGER /* Quality of schools in the neighborhood (e.g., rating from 1 to 5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the property type (e.g., Residential, Commercial) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the property type */,
  "is_residential" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the property type is residential */,
  "is_commercial" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the property type is commercial */,
  "is_rental" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the property type is suitable for rental */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "amenities" (
  "amenity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each amenity */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property the amenity belongs to */,
  "amenity_name" TEXT /* Name of the amenity (e.g., Pool, Gym) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the amenity */,
  "amenity_type" TEXT /* Type of amenity (e.g., indoor, outdoor) */,
  "amenity_cost" INTEGER /* Cost associated with the amenity (if any) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("amenity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_amenities_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agent */,
  "agent_name" TEXT /* Full name of the agent */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the agent */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the agent */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* Real estate license number of the agent */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the agent from clients */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years the agent has been in the real estate business */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each owner */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Full name of the owner */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the owner */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the owner */,
  "is_company" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the owner is a company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company (if applicable) */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the owner from clients */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "listings" (
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each listing */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being listed */,
  "listing_date" TEXT /* Date the property was listed */,
  "listing_price" INTEGER /* Listing price of the property */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent handling the listing */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the owner listing the property */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the listing (e.g., active, sold, pending) */,
  "listing_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the listing */,
  "date_sold" TEXT /* Date the property was sold (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("listing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_listings_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_listings_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES owners ("owner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_listings_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "photos" (
  "photo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each photo */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property the photo belongs to */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL of the photo */,
  "photo_type" TEXT /* Type of photo (e.g., exterior, interior, garden) */,
  "photo_description" TEXT /* Description of the photo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("photo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_photos_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "virtual_tours" (
  "tour_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each virtual tour */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property the virtual tour belongs to */,
  "tour_url" TEXT /* URL of the virtual tour */,
  "tour_type" TEXT /* Type of virtual tour (e.g., 360-degree, video) */,
  "tour_description" TEXT /* Description of the virtual tour */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tour_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_virtual_tours_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market trend */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* ID of the neighborhood the trend belongs to */,
  "sales_history" TEXT /* Sales history of the neighborhood */,
  "price_trend" TEXT /* Price trend of the neighborhood */,
  "average_price" INTEGER /* Average property price in the neighborhood */,
  "price_growth_rate" REAL /* Annual growth rate of property prices in the neighborhood */,
  "inventory_level" INTEGER /* Current inventory level of properties in the neighborhood */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_trends_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "valuations" (
  "valuation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each valuation */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being valued */,
  "valuation_date" TEXT /* Date the valuation was performed */,
  "estimated_value" INTEGER /* Estimated value of the property */,
  "valuation_method" TEXT /* Method used for the valuation (e.g., comparable sales, income approach) */,
  "valuation_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments related to the valuation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("valuation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_valuations_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "communications" (
  "communication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each communication */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property the communication belongs to */,
  "sender_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sender */,
  "receiver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the receiver */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message being sent */,
  "communication_type" TEXT /* Type of communication (e.g., email, phone call, text message) */,
  "communication_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the communication */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the communication (e.g., read, unread) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("communication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_communications_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)
